name: codex-watchdog
description: Controls a server-side scheduled Codex watcher from VSCode Remote.

scripts.test: npm run test:generated && npm run test:host-utils && npm run test:smoke

commands.title: Codex Watchdog: Create Demo Project Template
Codex Watchdog: Refresh Generated Watcher Files
Codex Watchdog: Run Once and Start Timer
Codex Watchdog: Accept Proposed State Update

codexWatchdog.intervalMinutes.description: Interval for the systemd user timer.

codexWatchdog.projectRoot.description: Optional absolute path to the project folder controlled by Codex Watchdog. If empty, the extension uses the remembered project root selected from the Command Palette.

codexWatchdog.timeoutMinutes.description: Maximum duration for one watchdog run.

codexWatchdog.compactEveryRuns.description: Run a report-curation/compaction cycle every N watchdog runs. Set to 0 to disable scheduled compaction.

codexWatchdog.role.description: Watchdog role. runner executes the project-local work loop; supervisor performs low-frequency audit, anti-snowball, blocker triage, and reviewer-pending coordination.

codexWatchdog.phaseOffsetMinutes.description: Initial systemd timer offset after boot/start. Use this to stagger runner and supervisor wakeups.

codexWatchdog.supervisorLightFollowup.description: When role=supervisor, run a lightweight follow-up pass after newly completed runner reports or changed reviewer/blocker markers instead of waiting for the heavy audit cadence.

codexWatchdog.supervisorAuditEveryRunner.description: When role=supervisor, run a heavy audit after this many completed runner reports since the previous successful supervisor audit.

codexWatchdog.codexBin.description: Codex CLI executable. If set to codex, the extension tries to resolve an absolute path when installing the timer.

codexWatchdog.codexHome.description: Separate CODEX_HOME for unattended watcher runs.

codexWatchdog.sandboxMode.description: Sandbox mode for scheduled codex exec runs. workspace-write is forced back to read-only unless agent/workspace_write_policy.json enables it.

codexWatchdog.servicePrefix.description: Prefix for generated systemd user service and timer units.
